episodes.title: How Cult Leader Michael Ryan Manipulated His Family Into Murder | Evil Lives Here
episodes.description:
Dennis Ryan recounts how his father, cult leader Michael Ryan, manipulated their family with religious extremism, leading Dennis into a violent cult world that ultimately resulted in torture, murder, and lifelong consequences.
 #EvilLivesHere #LoveParanormal

Welcome to the official Love Paranormal YouTube channel, your ultimate destination for the best paranormal clips from all your favourite discovery+ shows.
Explore mysterious encounters, spine-tingling moments, and stories that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
